project_parts.notes: Code-generation factory; not a runtime. Also usable as a library.

No API/DB/UI; documented input schema + domain dataclasses + task DAG as data-models
Supporting docs written: overview, architecture, source-tree, data-models, component-inventory, development-guide, vision
